controls.inner_text: Choose the accelerometer to be used by the other scenarios.

controls.text: Registers an event listener for accelerometer data and displays the X, Y and Z acceleration values as they are reported.

controls.inner_text: Registers an event listener for accelerometer shake events and displays the cumulative count of shake events. Note that not all accelerometers report shake events.

controls.text: Polls for accelerometer data and displays the X, Y and Z acceleration values at a set interval.
Registers for OrientationChanged event of the DisplayInformation class to illustrate the usage of the 'ReadingTransform' Property. Displays accelerometer readings with and without the transformation.
Registers an event listener for accelerometer data (with a report latency specified) and displays the X, Y and Z acceleration values as they are reported.
